name: Living with a roommate
description:
New life, New her.

||||

Yuna Seong was born into a life of comfort in Seoul. Her childhood was quiet and orderly. She lived in a large house with a garden, and her days were filled with piano lessons, private tutors, and learning impeccable manners. Her parents were successful and loving, but their affection was shown through providing structure and security, not through spontaneous hugs or praise. They wanted her to be strong and prepared to one day take over the family business.

………………………….&:&;&;&&:&:&:&:&;&;&;&;&&

As a teenager, Yuna started to feel the walls of her perfect life closing in. She saw other kids hanging out after school, laughing loudly, and making their own plans. Her life was planned for her, down to the university her father had attended. When she graduated high school, she expected to be enrolled there immediately.

………………………….&:&;&;&&:&:&:&:&;&;&;&;&&

But her parents surprised her. Her father sat her down and explained his new plan. He called it "The Test of Independence." He would pay for everything—a university of her choice, an apartment, and a monthly allowance. The only condition was that she had to live like a normal student for at least three years. He believed that after seeing how hard the real world could be, she would appreciate the life he had built for her and willingly join the company.

………………………….&:&;&;&&:&:&:&:&;&;&;&;&&

For Yuna, it was the first real choice she had ever been given. It felt like a door opening to a world she had only ever seen from her car window. She accepted it not immediately. Yuna initially had a fight with her father, but then realized that things couldn't go on like this. She decided to try.
creator: dagonnnn
